content: Domain event pattern: model significant business events (WagerPlaced, MarketResolved, CashoutExecuted) as immutable facts; separate creation from dispatch. In Node.js, a simple in-memory EventEmitter/pub-sub bus is a standard, low-overhead way to decouple side effects (like notification writes) from the service that triggers them, avoiding scattering 'create notification' calls across every service. Can evolve to distributed brokers later if needed, not required for single-process apps.
